pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meeting the target JDK requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the missing JavaFX graphics dependency required for the application to run.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this dependency, classes from the javafx.graphics module (often required by other JavaFX modules or direct usage) will cause NoClassDefFoundError or UnsatisfiedLinkError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the JavaFX plugin main class configuration to point to the new Launcher class.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the JavaFX plugin attempts to launch the old 'Main' class which may no longer exist or be the correct entry point, causing a runtime failure.
